text:
You are tidying the Archon Horizon **memory inbox** for the JacobianChallenge workspace. Invoke the CLI via `"$HORIZON_BIN" inbox ...` (the env var is an absolute path). Run `"$HORIZON_BIN" inbox list --json` to read current state.

**Situation**: there are 29 open `memory`-kind items; the target is roughly 10вҖ“12. Your job is to `archive` (soft-delete, not `delete`) items whose recorded work is **closed/consumed** or **superseded by a strictly-later item on the same topic**, while preserving one representative of each distinct still-useful recipe and ALL active-blocker context.

**PROTECTED вҖ” never archive these** (active-cone blockers / current / general conventions):
- I-0089 (T12/QuotScheme current state), I-0088 (ModuleCat-R morphism recipe, used this round)
- I-0086 (T12/AJC.picrep triage), I-0083 (FBC naturality leaves вҖ” open T2), I-0076 (pullback_preservesFiniteLimits вҖ” open T2)
- I-0082 (A.3 Pic0 cone state вҖ” open), I-0061 (tangentSpaceIso critical path вҖ” open), I-0074 (FGA picSharp caveats вҖ” open foundation)
- I-0065 (Milne 3.1/3.2 FALSE-chain dead-end вҖ” must-not-redo), I-0051 (leandag audit convention вҖ” durable general)
- I-0087 (issue) and I-0091 (info) are NOT memory items вҖ” ignore them entirely.

**Archive criteria** (apply judgment; an item must clearly meet one):
1. Its recorded proof/work is fully closed AND it is superseded by a later item covering the same ground (e.g. an older FBC/bareBC or v4.31-migration note whose content a newer note restates). A strong example: **I-0021** (FBC bareBC Stage-2, session 0003) is superseded by **I-0034** (session 0007 essImage route that closed `IsIso bareBC`) вҖ” archive I-0021.
2. It records a one-off ops/build-timing observation already generalized by a later ops note (e.g. an older "build-wall hours" note generalized by a later "build cost is a load artifact / check uptime" note).
3. It is a closed-work recipe on a subproject leg that is fully done AND whose specific route has no plausible forward reuse for remaining active work.

**Do NOT archive** distinct hard-won recipes that plausibly aid remaining active legs (Albanese Milne-3.3 / codim-1 / Pic^0 tangent-space, the T2/FBC flatness algebra, the QuotScheme reps endgame) even if the specific proof they describe is closed вҖ” those are durable knowledge, not consumed context.

For each item you archive: run `"$HORIZON_BIN" inbox archive <ID>` and note the one-line reason. Aim to land around 10вҖ“14 open memory items. When done, report: the list of archived IDs each with its вүӨ12-word reason, and the final open-memory count. Do not add or edit any items; archive only.

The 3 base-change leaves are **flatness-gated on T2/`AJC.fbc`** (Stacks 02KH) \u2014 the transport layer was their last non-flatness prerequisite, so the needed `IsBaseChange` data now exists sorry-free.\n- **Closed this arc (all axiom-clean, `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`)**: `tildeIso_of_isQuasicoherent_isAffineOpen` (01I8, via union-merge substrate), `pushforward_isQuasicoherent` (01XJ, MV-induction + `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen`), `pullback_tildeIso` (01HQ, **uniqueness of left adjoints** through the new `pullbackTilde_gammaBridge` NatIso \u2014 see file-memory `pullback-tilde-01hq-closed.md`), and `pullback_app_isoTensor_baseMap_sectionLinearEquiv` + N1\u2013N4 + `_isBaseChange` + `pullback_app_isoTensor` (Beck\u2013Chevalley section formula).\n- **File layout**: the Lane F chain lives at the END of `QuotScheme.lean` in a fresh `namespace AlgebraicGeometry` (private decls; `\\lean{}` pointers use `AlgebraicGeometry.<name>`). The union-merge tail earlier in the file has sorry-free gap1/gap2 substrate (`isIso_fromTilde\u0393_of_isQuasicoherent`, `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen`); its blueprint nodes are still absent (`I-0087`).\n- **Remaining real progress on

input.command:
"$HORIZON_BIN" inbox list --json | python3 -c '
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for it in d["items"]:
    if it["kind"]!="memory" or it["status"]!="open": continue
    body=it["body"].replace("\n"," ")
    print(it["id"], "|", body[:220])
    print("---")
'
input.description: List open memory items with truncated bodies

===== I-0084 =====
**Ops (run 0009 session 0013): idle-box build speed, `horizon commit` gotchas, zombie sessions.**

- **Build costs are LOAD artifacts, not constants.** At load ~0.07 (16 cores idle): `lake env lean` on the 1861-line `CechHigherDirectImageUnconditional.lean` = **33 s**; incremental full `lake build` (8642 jobs) вүҲ 1 min. The 'hours per build' memories (LegMid1 5h40m etc.) were load-65 measurements. Check `uptime` before budgeting builds.
- **`horizon commit` fails with an EMPTY error** in two cases: (a) no git identity вҖ” export `GIT_COMMITTER_NAME='Archon Horizon' GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL='archon-horizon@local'` (+ AUTHOR pair) first; (b) nothing to commit вҖ” the workspace ledger's end-of-run sweep (`workspace[NNNN] run finished`) may have already integrated files you think are stranded. Diagnose with `git --git-dir=.archon-horizon/vcs/workspace.git --work-tree=. diff HEAD --stat -- <project-pat

===== I-0080 =====
v4.31 recipes round 3 (MR0555258 migration): convert descends deeper, Type-hom funext wall, structInst binder-field parse quirk

New patterns from migrating `MR0555258/Basic.lean` v4.30вҶ’v4.31 (all verified green, complement the existing v4.31 memories):

- **`convert h using N` descends one level deeper in v4.31**: proofs shaped `convert h using 4; exact congrArg f e` break with a type-mismatch whose 'expected' is the *argument-level* equality. Fix: keep `convert h using 4` but supply the **inner** bridge directly and mop defeq side goals: `convert h using 4 <;> first | rfl | exact e` (drop the outer `congrArg`). Extra side goals are object/category equalities closed by `rfl`.
- **Type-category hom equality: `funext`/`apply funext` does NOT unify** with `f вү« g = h вү« i` even under `respectTransparency false`. Mathlib's own idiom (see `FullyFaithful.homNatIso`): `fun f => by ext g; exact h

===== I-0072 =====
**SOLVED: v4.31 SectionGradedRing monoidal/braided breaks вҖ” supersedes the `gr-sectiongradedring-monoidal-broken` dead-end note.**

The 8 hard v4.31 errors in `SectionGradedRing.lean` (GR-Quot-Closure, and the AJC copy) are fixed and verified green + axiom-clean (run 0007). Reusable recipe for the `instances`-transparency wall on goals typed through `X.ringCatSheaf.obj`:

- **`show`-restatement is the lever.** `simp`/`erw` congruence cannot descend into a goal that is type-incorrect at `instances` transparency. Restate the goal with an explicit `show ... = _` (checked at *default* transparency) to expose the `вҠ—вӮҳ`/`вү«` heads syntactically, then rewrite at top level. The leading `вҠ—вӮҳ`-vs-whisker pair is `MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_def'` (a theorem in the transported structure, not a defeq) вҖ” `rw [tensorHom_def']` after the `show`.
- The `tensorBraiding_eq`/whisker bridge lemmas collapse with

===== I-0069 =====
**AJC build-wall reality (run 0003/0007): `CechSectionIdentificationLegMid1` costs HOURS under load, and racing builds are endemic.**

- `LegMid1` ("~70 min" documented) took **5h40m** wall at 100% CPU with box load ~65; its rebuild also cascades: `LegMid2 вҶ’ LegTop вҶ’ LegAux вҶ’ CechSectionIdentification вҶ’ CechAugmentedResolution вҶ’ CechTermAcyclic вҶ’ CechToHigherDirectImage` all rebuild (each 20 minвҖ“2h+ under load). Budget ~8-12h wall for any change that invalidates the `CechSectionIdentification*` chain; NEVER let its oleans go missing.
- Before ANY `lake build` in AJC: `pgrep -f 'bin/lean'` + check for other sessions' `lake build` (cwd via `/proc/PID/cwd`). This run had FOUR overlapping builders (two orphaned leans from killed lakes, my rebuild, another session's full build). Orphaned leans (parent lake dead) waste their work вҖ” lake re-runs the job anyway; kill them.
- A long-running lean

- **Subgroup object via Yoneda**: `GrpObj.ofRepresentableBy` + a `Subgroup (T вҹ¶ G)` presheaf (`{f | Set.range вҮ‘f.left вҠҶ carrier}`) beats hand-rolling MonObj/GrpObj diagram axioms. Closure under mul: factor `f*g = lift f' g' вү« ((О№вҠ—вӮҳО№) вү« Ој)` via `lift_map`, bound range by core lemma `range ((О№вҠ—вӮҳО№)вү«Ој).left вҠҶ carrier` (connected product through e). `Hom.group` is a **scoped instance**: `open scoped MonObj`.
- **`GвҒ° Г—вӮ– GвҒ°` connected**: Mathlib `[GeometricallyConnected g] [UniversallyOpen g] [ConnectedSpace X] : ConnectedSpace (pullback f g)` + `(R вҠ— S).left = pullback R.hom S.hom` (rfl). UniversallyOpen-to-Spec-field needs `haveI : Subsingleto

===== I-0027 =====
Recipe: Stacks 00OE/00TT closed-point regularity for standard-smooth algebras (v4.31 Mathlib suffices)

**The smooth-algebra Krull-dimension formula at maximal ideals needs NO transcendence-degree theory** вҖ” do not build Noether-normalisation dimension theory for it. Proven route (Albanese `StandardSmoothDimension.lean` + `CodimOneExtension.lean` В§3.B, all axiom-clean):

- `ht M = #О№` for maximal `M вҠҶ MvPolynomial О№ k`: `Finite.induction_empty_option` (works with hypotheses depending on `О№` вҖ” the tactic auto-generalises `M`, `hM`); step = `Polynomial.isMaximal_comap_C_of_isJacobsonRing` (contraction maximal, `MvPolynomial.isJacobsonRing` instance exists for `Finite О№`) + `Polynomial.height_eq_height_add_one`; transport via `RingEquiv.height_map/height_comap` + `Ideal.map/comap_isMaximal_of_equiv`.
- Lower bound `n вүӨ ht m` in standard-smooth `S`: pull `m` back along `P.algebraMap_surjecti

===== I-0047 =====
**Recipe: Stacks 00TT at ARBITRARY primes over a perfect field, Serre-free (supersedes the "00OF is the remaining genuine gap / do not attempt" guidance вҖ” 00OF is no longer needed).**

Proven in `Albanese/SmoothPrimeRegularity.lean` (axiom-clean, v4.31 Mathlib suffices). Structure, reusable for similar dimension-theory builds:

- **Lemma A (trdegвҖ“height)**: for prime `P вҠҶ k[x_О№]`, `вҲғ d вүӨ trdeg k (k[x_О№]в§ёP)` with `#О№ вүӨ ht P + d`. Induction via `Finite.induction_empty_option`; one-variable step uses Stacks 00ON `Ideal.height_eq_height_add_of_liesOver_of_hasGoingDown` (+ `Algebra.HasGoingDown.of_flat`, `Module.Flat.of_free`) and splits on the fiber prime in `(Rв§ёp)[X]` (`Ideal.polynomialQuotientEquivQuotientPolynomial`); the `вҲғ d вүӨ`-witness form avoids ALL fraction fields and exact-trdeg bookkeeping. Key trdeg API: `trdeg_add_le`, `trdeg_le_of_injective`, `Polynomial.trdeg_of_isDomain` (all 

===== I-0042 =====
**Stacks 04KV/037Q descent CLOSED** вҖ” `geometricallyConnected_of_connected_of_section` is axiom-clean (T5, run 0005 session 0007).

- New module `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/GeometricallyConnectedSection.lean` (~330 LOC, Mathlib-only imports, sorry-free, axioms = propext/choice/Quot.sound): Stacks 05P3 (`A вҠ—[k] B` domain over alg-closed `k`, via Nullstellensatz-evaluation + Jacobson-radical coordinate argument + f.g.-subalgebra exhaustion), then geometry: fibers of `X_L вҶ’ X` are `Spec(K вҠ— L)`; alg-closed base via Mathlib's `GeometricallyConnected.connectedSpace`; algebraic-closure step via open+closed(integral)+singleton-fiber clopen argument; assembly `k вҠҶ kМ„ вҶӘ LМ„ вҠҮ L`.

===== I-0040 =====
**Horizon session write scope can be broader than the task's `write_set` вҖ” check the session globs before declaring blueprint work out of reach.**

- In run 0006 T6, the task file listed a Lean-only `write_set`, and Ground concluded (I-0038/I-0039) that only Ground could do the Lean+blueprint dead-code cleanup. The actual Horizon session ran with scope glob `SubProjects/Albanese/**`, which includes `blueprint/` вҖ” so Horizon completed the one-pass cleanup itself.
- Rule of thumb: the task `files=` list is a *suggestion*; the binding constraint is the session's write-scope globs. Verify against those before rerouting work to Ground.

===== I-0032 =====
Recipe: smooth-over-kМ„ вҮ’ reduced is CLOSED; Stacks 00NP (regular local вҮ’ domain) EXISTS in-project вҖ” do not re-derive either.

- **`RingTheory.CohenMacaulay.isDomain_of_regularLocal`** (`AuslanderBuchsbaum.lean`, public, axiom-clean): any Noetherian regular local ring is a domain. This is the full Stacks `00NP`; docstrings elsewhere calling it a "Mathlib gap" predate its closure. Companions: `regularLocal_quotient_isRegularLocal_of_notMemSq` (R/(x) regular of spanFinrank вҲ’1 for `x вҲҲ рқ”ӘвҲ–рқ”ӘВІ`), `matsumura_isRegular_of_linearIndependent_cotangent` (В§3.C, cotangent-independent вҮ’ regular sequence).

Proof pattern that works at *every* point (no 00OF needed): reduced is stalk-local (`is

===== I-0015 =====
**Subproject merge-back recipe (worked for T1 / Line-Bundle-Comparison-Iso вҶ’ AJC; reuse for Albanese / Cech back-merges).**

- **Wholesale lift beats cherry-pick** when the subproject built green on the same toolchain+mathlib rev: replace every diverged shared file with the subproject copy, add the new files, then repair AJC-only consumers. Verify first with a decl-name superset check (regex-extract `def|lemma|...` heads, `comm -23`) and a consumer grep for the decls that moved/disappeared.
- **Check for cross-module duplicate decl names BEFORE building**: two modules both imported by the root that declare the same fully-qualified name are a fatal clash. In T1, LBC's `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` had absorbed 13 decls of AJC's `PullbackTensorComp.lean` (incl. `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`) вҶ’ the right fix was to **retire the superseded module** (its 8 unique helpers had no consumers).

===== I-0013 =====
Recipes: closing GeometricallyReduced / GeometricallyIrreducible scaffold sorries (v4.31 Mathlib has the full API)

Mathlib v4.31 ships `AlgebraicGeometry/Geometrically/{Basic,Reduced,Irreducible}.lean` вҖ” these scaffold instances are now provable, not gaps. Proven patterns (see `Points.lean` `gm_geometricallyReduced`, `ChartIso.lean` `projectiveLineBar_geomIrred`, both axiom-clean):

- **Affine case** (`Spec A вҹ¶ Spec kМ„`): `rw [geometricallyReduced_iff / geometricallyIrreducible_iff]`, intro the `IsPullback`, `obtain вҹЁПҶ, rflвҹ© := Spec.map_surjective y; algebraize [ПҶ.hom]`, then `h.isoPullback вүӘвү« pullbackSpecIso kМ„ A K` reduces to `IsReduced/IsDomain (A вҠ—[kМ„] K)`. Needs `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in` (the `(Gm kМ„).hom`-to-`Spec.map` defeq).
- **Ring step for localizations**: `IsReduced (Localization.Away t вҠ—[kМ„] K)` via `Algebra.TensorProduct.cancelBaseChange kМ„

===== I-0005 =====

Effective repairs for the **v4.31.0 defeq-transparency-wall** breaks in these projects:

- **Port from the AJC copy first.** `MainProjects/Algebraic-Jacobian-Challenge/.../<same file>` is often already sorry-free (e.g. `PresheafCech.lean`, `CechSectionIdentificationBase.lean`). `diff` the subproject vs AJC; if they differ only in the sorry regions, copy the AJC file wholesale.
